layoutRegions.name: drill-summary
layoutRegions.purpose: Summarizes active drills, response times, failed approvals, and sealed report readiness.

layoutRegions.name: drill-queue
layoutRegions.purpose: Shows simulated emergency grants with approvers, backups, response time, coverage, evidence, and state.

layoutRegions.name: drill-workbench
layoutRegions.purpose: Tracks failed approvals, response lanes, backup coverage, review evidence, and rollback-safe controls.

components.name: DrillCard
components.purpose: Emergency approver drill card with simulated grant, response time, coverage, and evidence.
interactions: response chip remains visible at all widths
grant and evidence facts wrap without horizontal scrolling

components.name: FailureRepair
components.purpose: Failed approval repair row with cause, owner, due date, and state.
interactions: row layout stays readable on narrow viewports

components.name: DrillChecklist
components.purpose: Rollback-safe checklist for sealing emergency approver drill reports.

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button, row, input, and command item has a visible :focus-visible state.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
